```sql
FROM employee_projects ep
JOIN departments d ON ep.employee_id = d.id AND ep.project_id = (SELECT p.id FROM projects p WHERE p.name = ep.project_id LIMIT 1)
JOIN employee_projects ep2 ON ep.project_id = ep2.project_id AND ep.employee_id = ep2.employee_id
```

```sql
WITH ranked_employees AS (
    SELECT 
        e.id AS employee_id,
        e.name AS employee_name,
        d.name AS department_name,
        SUM(ep.hours) AS total_hours_worked,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.department_id ORDER BY e.salary DESC) as rank
    FROM 
        employees e
    JOIN 
        employee_projects ep ON e.id = ep.employee_id
    JOIN 
        departments d ON e.department_id = d.id
)
SELECT 
    de.department_name,
    ee.employee_name
FROM 
    ranked_employees ee
JOIN 
    departments de ON ee.department_name = de.name
WHERE 
    ee.rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    de.name ASC;
```

WITH project_hours AS (
    SELECT 
        p.id AS project_id, 
        SUM(e.hours) AS total_hours
    FROM 
        projects p
    JOIN 
        employee_projects ep ON p.id = ep.project_id
    JOIN 
        employees e ON p.lead_employee_id = e.id
    GROUP BY 
        p.id
)
SELECT 
    ph.project_id, ph.total_hours, p.name
FROM 
    project_hours ph
JOIN 
    projects p ON ph.project_id = p.id
WHERE 
    ph.total_hours > 100
ORDER BY 
    p.name ASC;
